Projects.

ChaletDorf — 5★ Wellness & Longevity Resort

Luxury Real Estate Presale Strategy Visual Identity AI Production

Successful presale · €3k/mo budget · team of 10

Jewellery Creative Direction 6 Cities Meta Ads

Complete visual direction for a Balkan jewellery brand spanning 6 cities. Seasonal campaigns, Meta Ads management, and creative team coordination across 12 people over 4 years.

Consistent brand recognition across Balkans · steady growth

Beauty Content Strategy AI Concepts

About
StrategyFirst.
5+
Years

Industries
12
Team max

I am a strategist who thinks before she makes. My work begins where most stop — with the question: why should this work?

I analyse the audience, their psychology, their motivations. I study the market and competitive context. I find the point where a brand's ambition meets a real human need. Only from this understanding does everything else emerge.

With 5+ years across luxury real estate, jewellery, F&B, and beauty, I have learned that universal solutions do not exist. What exists is deep understanding of a specific context — and from it, work that actually performs.

I work equally well with AI tools and classical production. What I choose depends on what solves the problem — not what is trending.

What I Bring

Six disciplines combined into one coherent practice — always in service of the strategy.

01
◈

Creative Direction & Brand Strategy

Building visual languages from zero. Tone, typography, palette, photographic approach. Identity systems that hold and scale.

02
◎

Presale & Lifestyle Visualisation

Making things real before they exist. Investor decks, lifestyle imagery, atmospheric content that closes sales.

03
⬡

AI-Enhanced Production

Midjourney, Runway, KlingAI, Sora — used strategically. Blended with real photography for authenticity.

04
◻

Content Architecture

Multichannel systems that hold together. Editorial calendars, thematic funnels, platform-specific logic.

05
△

Paid Media & Performance

Meta and Google Ads with a creative-performance mindset. Budget optimisation, audience targeting, creative testing.

06
○

Team Leadership

Briefing, mentoring, managing cross-functional teams up to 12 people across marketing, production, and retail.
